title: Chambers Canada recognizes McCarthy Tétrault as a market leader in 2025 directory rankings
content:
## Chambers Canada recognizes McCarthy Tétrault as a market leader in 2025 directory rankings
Chambers Canada has once again recognized McCarthy Tétrault as a market leader for outstanding client service and industry-focused expertise across a wide array of categories. The firm leads the Chambers Canada 2025: The Leading Lawyers and Law Firms in Canada directory rankings with the most Band 1 lawyer and practice rankings combined, and more overall rankings than any other Canadian firm.
In all, Chambers Canada 2025 recognized McCarthy Tétrault with:
- 35 Band 1 lawyer rankings
- 31 Band 1 practice and industry area rankings
- 246 total lawyer rankings
- 66 total practice and industry area rankings
“We’re grateful to Chambers Canada for consistently recognizing McCarthy Tétrault’s dedication to client service and deep domestic and international expertise,” said Dave Leonard , Partner and CEO of McCarthy Tétrault. “Our lawyers are exceptionally strategic and truly understand what drives results. The firm’s industry-focused structure enhances our ability to deliver effective, innovative solutions. Coupled with our national presence, this approach is a critical asset to our clients and a key factor in our success.”
“McCarthy Tétrault is known for understanding our clients’ businesses, the industries in which they operate, and our ability to anticipate and swiftly react to the shifting economic landscape across key industries for the benefit of our clients,” said Lara Nathans , Partner and Industry Strategy Leader, McCarthy Tétrault. “Clients rely on us to assemble integrated, cross-practice teams who work together to help them capitalize on opportunities, address challenges and get ahead of issues impacting their businesses. Their support consistently positions us in Chambers Canada’s top rankings.”
The firm received top-tier rankings across 31 practices and industries, and Band 1 rankings in the following areas:
- Competition/Antitrust
- Corporate/Commercial: The Elite (British Columbia, Ontario, Québec)
- Dispute Resolution: Class Action (Defence)
- Employment and Labour (Canada, Ontario)
- Energy & Natural Resources: Mining
- Healthcare: Contentious
- Information Technology
- Insurance: Transactional & Regulatory
- Intellectual Property: Litigation
- International Trade/WTO
- Litigation: General Commercial (Canada, British Columbia, Ontario)
- Litigation: Securities (Ontario)
- Projects: (PPP & Infrastructure)
- Real Estate (Canada, Alberta, British Columbia, Ontario, Québec)
- White Collar Crime & Government Investigations
View the full list of the firm’s top-ranked lawyers .
Published since 1990, Chambers and Partners ranks the best law firms and lawyers across 200 jurisdictions throughout the world. Rankings are based on independent and objective research, including peer and client feedback. Chambers Canada ranks law firms and lawyers in 90 practice areas and industries in Canada.
About McCarthy Tétrault
McCarthy Tétrault LLP provides a broad range of legal services, providing strategic and industry-focused advice and solutions for Canadian and international interests. The firm has substantial presence in Canada’s major commercial centres as well as in New York City and London.
Built on an integrated approach to the practice of law and delivery of innovative client services, the firm brings its legal talent, industry insight and practice experience to help clients achieve the results that are important to them.
For further information on McCarthy Tétrault or any of the above, please contact media@mccarthy.ca .
